EmailTemplate.name: AES - Induction invite
EmailTemplate.subject: Time to book your Alliance Extra Staff Induction Session
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
BOOK YOUR INDUCTION SESSION AND GET STARTED.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Your first shift is just around the corner! But first you need to complete the Alliance Extra Staff Induction. You can select online or to visit one of our branches for an in-person induction.
Start by selecting a day and time that suits you:
BOOK MY INDUCTION
If you come into one of our offices, you will leave with your new Alliance Extra Staff uniform, ID badge and your first shift!
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
